scoring.summary: Higher scores favor long Newtonian runs where the planet remains bound, switches stellar hosts, and the stellar dance stays broad, democratic, and varied. Bound long arcs are rewarded; persistent positive-energy planet escape and long-lived binary or circumbinary hierarchy are penalized hard.
scoring.searchSpace: Mass triples, stellar triangle scale, stellar phase/spin/velocity perturbations, and planet anchor, host, radius, phase, tangential speed, and radial speed.
